movie-philosophy.html.title: How I Choose What to Watch: A Film Philosophy
movie-philosophy.html.description: How Jevan Goldsmith picks films, what he looks for in great cinema, and why movies are a fast way to live a life that is not your own.

people-philosophy.html.title: How I Approach People: A Relationship Philosophy
people-philosophy.html.description: How Jevan Goldsmith thinks about friendships, partnerships, and the relationships that compound over a lifetime versus the ones that quietly drain you.

living-manifesto.html.title: Living Manifesto: Principles, Standards & Long-Horizon Bets
living-manifesto.html.description: Jevan Goldsmith's living manifesto: principles, standards, and long-horizon bets for time, work, relationships, and better decisions.

speeches.html.title: Speeches, Talks & Remarks by Jevan Goldsmith
speeches.html.description: A running archive of speeches, talks, and remarks by Jevan Goldsmith, written for delivery and kept as a record of what was said and why.

better-thinking.title: Better Thinking: Field Notes, Essays, Books & Tools
better-thinking.description: A topic hub for better thinking: first principles, decision-making, mental models, reflection, books, essays, resources, and Field Notes.
better-thinking.thesis: Better thinking is a practice, not a personality trait. This trail collects the notes, books, resources, and skills that help turn vague intuition into clearer judgment.

books-reading.title: Books & Reading: Recommendations, Philosophy & Notes
books-reading.description: A topic hub for books and reading: recommendations, reading philosophy, book notes, useful ideas, and Field Notes from Jevan Goldsmith.
books-reading.thesis: Reading only compounds when it changes how you notice, decide, and act. This hub is the path through the books and reading systems I keep returning to.

ai-assisted-work.title: AI-Assisted Work: Notes, Tools & Practical Systems
ai-assisted-work.description: A topic hub for AI-assisted work: how Jevan Goldsmith uses AI for research, writing, coding, systems, and better work without outsourcing taste.
ai-assisted-work.thesis: AI is most useful when it accelerates judgment instead of replacing it. This trail collects the workflows, tools, and notes behind that balance.

personal-systems.title: Personal Systems: Weekly Reviews, Notes & Operating Loops
personal-systems.description: A topic hub for personal systems: weekly reviews, planning, reflection, notes, energy, decisions, and practical operating loops.
personal-systems.thesis: A personal system is not a productivity aesthetic. It is the scaffolding that helps lessons survive the week and turn into better choices.

tools-objects.title: Tools & Objects That Earned Their Place
tools-objects.description: A topic hub for tools, objects, gear, and digital systems Jevan Goldsmith actually uses, including The Shelf and related Field Notes.
tools-objects.thesis: Objects are interesting when they remove friction. This hub collects the tools that stayed, what they replaced, and the systems around them.

business-building.title: Business & Building: Projects, Strategy & Useful Experiments
business-building.description: A topic hub for business and building: projects, strategy, finance, experiments, essays, skills, and field notes from Jevan Goldsmith.
business-building.thesis: Building is where taste meets contact with reality. This trail follows the projects, business notes, strategic questions, and useful experiments.

real-estate-development.title: Real Estate Development Notes: Finance, Sites & Learning
real-estate-development.description: A topic hub for real estate development notes, feasibility, finance, site selection, project learning, and related resources.
real-estate-development.thesis: Real estate development is a long-game craft: finance, place, construction, relationships, timing, and judgment in one messy bundle.

health-performance.title: Health & Performance: Systems for Energy and Better Work
health-performance.description: A topic hub for health and performance notes, systems, habits, energy, recovery, and tools that support better work.
health-performance.thesis: Health is not separate from useful work. Energy, attention, recovery, and repeatable systems are part of the operating stack.
